title: Abstraction — hiding complexity at the right level

depth_signals: title contains two distinct sub-ideas (hiding complexity + right level)
Core Concepts has 6 sub-sections including a comparison concept and a named failure mode
Implementation section with 6-step process and a worked example
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Layered abstraction diagram showing three levels (user / interface / internals) with arrows indicating what each level sees and what it hides — contrasting with a decomposition task tree to show the two tools side by side.
